title: Top M.Sc (Ag) Entomology Colleges in Noida
content: M.Sc. (Ag.) Entomology is a two-year postgraduate programme that gives in-depth knowledge of insects and various aspects of it in specialized field. The students will have scientific and in depth knowledge and understanding of dynamics involved in plant protection and the population of insects. B.Sc. (Hons) Agriculture/ related degrees with minimum 60% marks for general and 55% for SC/ ST/ PH/ other reserved category candidates or equivalent CGPA Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit. 01 Get the in-depth knowledge of entomological principles required for the implementation and ongoing advancement of insect management technologies. 02 Demonstrate an analytical and inquisitive approach for development and advancement of entomological research. 03 Possess interpersonal abilities, professionalism in their creative work, a sense of moral obligation, and a dedication to society on both local and global scale. 01 Employ expertise to the resolution of insect related problems in agriculture. 02 Have knowledge and aptitude for problem-solving and critical thinking towards insect pest management 03 Develop and use the most appropriate crop production methods, resources, and IT tools while being aware of their constraints for management of insects. 04 Assess societal, health, safety, legal, and cultural issues, as well as the resulting duties, in relation to the professional practice of entomology. 05 Recognize the effects of expert agricultural solutions in the context of society and the environment for sustainable development and integrated pest management. 06 Develop into tenacious individuals who challenge, practice, and use the knowledge gained to develop solutions to problems in agricultural entomology. 07 Effectively perform on a personal level, as a team player or leader in any organization, and in multidisciplinary situations. 08 Incorporate moral principles to teaching and research in the various agricultural science fields. 01 Get the in-depth knowledge of entomological principles required for the implementation and ongoing advancement of insect management technologies. 02 Demonstrate an analytical and inquisitive approach for development and advancement of entomological research. 03 Possess interpersonal abilities, professionalism in their creative work, a sense of moral obligation, and a dedication to society on both local and global scale. 01 To apply knowledge and skills on ill effect of insect and pests on crop 02 To generate entrepreneurship skills and innovations in areas like Apiculture, Sericulture and mass multiplication of bio-agents. 03 To impart knowledge for continuously and systematically responds to the needs of Integrated insect and pest management 04 To develop ability to use innovative techniques for improving input use efficiency B.Sc. (Hons) Agriculture/ related degrees with minimum 60% marks for general and 55% for SC/ ST/ PH/ other reserved category candidates or equivalent CGPA Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit.
